definitions.en: memory relation that selects resources and summaries into a bounded context window
definitions.zh: 组装上下文是上下文组装关系，定义域为上下文组装，值域为上下文窗口；将资源、摘要、消息或工具结果放入有界上下文窗口，并保留顺序、预算与来源。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: コンテキスト組み立てはコンテキスト組み立て関係で、定義域はコンテキスト組み立て、値域はコンテキストウィンドウです。リソース、要約、メッセージ、ツール結果を有界コンテキストウィンドウへ入れ、順序、予算、出典を保持する。出典 2 件。

label: assigns work item to
definition: links a task distribution event to the worker agent that receives the scoped work item.

definitions.en: links a task distribution event to the worker agent that receives the scoped work item.
definitions.zh: 工作项分配关系把任务分发事件连接到接收有范围工作项的工作者智能体。
definitions.ja: 作業項目割り当て関係は、タスク分配イベントを、範囲づけられた作業項目を受け取る作業エージェントへ結びます。

label: associated with attempt
definition: links a runtime actor to the execution attempt for which it bears participation, responsibility, or provenance evidence.

definitions.en: links a runtime actor to the execution attempt for which it bears participation, responsibility, or provenance evidence.
definitions.zh: 把运行参与者连接到其具有参与、责任或溯源证据的执行尝试。
definitions.ja: 実行アクターを、参加、責任、来歴証拠を持つ実行試行へ接続します。

label: audit disclosure records disclosure filter
definition: links an audit disclosure record to the disclosure filter whose decision released, redacted, suppressed, or escalated content.

definitions.en: links an audit disclosure record to the disclosure filter whose decision released, redacted, suppressed, or escalated content.
definitions.zh: 该关系把审计披露记录连接到做出释放、脱敏、抑制或升级决策的披露过滤器。
definitions.ja: この関係は、監査開示記録を、内容の公開、秘匿、抑制、エスカレーションを判断した開示フィルタに結びます。

label: audit log summarizes audit record
definition: links an AuditLog collection to the runtime AuditRecord evidence it summarizes for review, diagnostics, disclosure, or governance reporting.

definitions.en: links an AuditLog collection to the runtime AuditRecord evidence it summarizes for review, diagnostics, disclosure, or governance reporting.
definitions.zh: 该关系把审计日志集合连接到其摘要化的运行审计记录证据。
definitions.ja: この関係は、監査ログ集合を、それが要約する実行監査記録証拠へ結びます。

label: authorizes
definition: legacy summary relation for a policy or permission artifact allowing an event; use concrete authorizes relations such as commit_approval_authorizes_side_effect for specific safety audit edges.

definitions.en: legacy summary relation for a policy or permission artifact allowing an event; use concrete authorizes relations such as commit_approval_authorizes_side_effect for specific safety audit edges.
definitions.zh: 授权是兼容旧图谱的摘要关系，用于表示策略或权限对象允许某个事件；具体审计图应优先使用提交批准授权副作用等更明确的关系。
definitions.ja: 許可関係は旧来の図との互換用の要約関係であり、ポリシーまたは権限オブジェクトがイベントを許可することを表します。監査図ではコミット承認が副作用を許可するなど、より具体的な関係を優先します。

label: belongs to data zone
definition: links a source or context artifact to the data zone governing its visibility, retention, and allowed use.

definitions.en: links a source or context artifact to the data zone governing its visibility, retention, and allowed use.
definitions.zh: 该关系把来源或上下文产物连接到治理其可见性、保留期限和允许用途的数据区。
definitions.ja: この関係は、出典またはコンテキスト成果物を、その可視性、保持、許可用途を統制するデータ区域に結びます。

label: blocking error blocks run attempt
definition: links a BlockingError to the RunAttempt it blocks or terminates so failure impact remains tied to a bounded execution attempt.

definitions.en: links a BlockingError to the RunAttempt it blocks or terminates so failure impact remains tied to a bounded execution attempt.
definitions.zh: 该关系把阻断错误连接到被阻断或终止的运行尝试。
definitions.ja: この関係は、ブロッキングエラーを、それが阻止または終了させた実行試行へ結びます。

label: blocks
definition: legacy summary relation for a policy or permission artifact blocking an event; use concrete blocks relations such as commit_denial_blocks_side_effect for specific safety audit edges.

definitions.en: legacy summary relation for a policy or permission artifact blocking an event; use concrete blocks relations such as commit_denial_blocks_side_effect for specific safety audit edges.
definitions.zh: 阻断是兼容旧图谱的摘要关系，用于表示策略或权限对象阻止某个事件；具体审计图应优先使用提交拒绝阻断副作用等更明确的关系。
definitions.ja: 遮断関係は旧来の図との互換用の要約関係であり、ポリシーまたは権限オブジェクトがイベントを遮断することを表します。監査図ではコミット拒否が副作用を遮断するなど、より具体的な関係を優先します。

label: boundary crossing authorized by
definition: links a boundary-crossing event to the policy decision that allowed, denied, escalated, sandboxed, or constrained that transfer.

definitions.en: links a boundary-crossing event to the policy decision that allowed, denied, escalated, sandboxed, or constrained that transfer.
definitions.zh: 该关系把边界穿越事件连接到允许、拒绝、升级、沙箱化或限制该转移的策略决策。
definitions.ja: この関係は、境界通過イベントを、その転送を許可、拒否、エスカレーション、サンドボックス化、制約したポリシー判断に結びます。

label: boundary crossing has source actor
definition: links a boundary-crossing event to the actor, service, tool, user, or remote agent that sends, emits, delegates, or initiates the transfer.

definitions.en: links a boundary-crossing event to the actor, service, tool, user, or remote agent that sends, emits, delegates, or initiates the transfer.
definitions.zh: 该关系把边界穿越事件连接到发起、发送、委派或产生转移的来源参与者、服务、工具、用户或远程智能体。
definitions.ja: この関係は、境界通過イベントを、転送を開始、送信、委任、発生させる送信元参加者、サービス、ツール、ユーザー、遠隔エージェントに結びます。

label: boundary crossing has source zone
definition: links a boundary-crossing event to the source data zone whose trust, retention, visibility, or handling policy applies before transfer.

definitions.en: links a boundary-crossing event to the source data zone whose trust, retention, visibility, or handling policy applies before transfer.
definitions.zh: 该关系把边界穿越事件连接到转移前适用信任、保留、可见性或处理策略的来源数据区。
definitions.ja: この関係は、境界通過イベントを、転送前に信頼、保持、可視性、取り扱い方針が適用される送信元データ区域に結びます。

label: boundary crossing has target actor
definition: links a boundary-crossing event to the actor, service, tool, user, or remote agent that receives, interprets, executes, or stores the transferred object.

definitions.en: links a boundary-crossing event to the actor, service, tool, user, or remote agent that receives, interprets, executes, or stores the transferred object.
definitions.zh: 该关系把边界穿越事件连接到接收、解释、执行或存储被转移对象的接收方参与者、服务、工具、用户或远程智能体。
definitions.ja: この関係は、境界通過イベントを、転送対象を受信、解釈、実行、保存する受信先参加者、サービス、ツール、ユーザー、遠隔エージェントに結びます。

label: boundary crossing has target zone
definition: links a boundary-crossing event to the destination data zone whose trust, retention, visibility, or handling policy applies after transfer.

definitions.en: links a boundary-crossing event to the destination data zone whose trust, retention, visibility, or handling policy applies after transfer.
definitions.zh: 该关系把边界穿越事件连接到转移后适用信任、保留、可见性或处理策略的目标数据区。
definitions.ja: この関係は、境界通過イベントを、転送後に信頼、保持、可視性、取り扱い方針が適用される宛先データ区域に結びます。

label: boundary crossing recorded by trace event
definition: links a boundary-crossing event to the observable trace event that records timestamp, actor, request, policy, and result evidence.

definitions.en: links a boundary-crossing event to the observable trace event that records timestamp, actor, request, policy, and result evidence.
definitions.zh: 该关系把边界穿越事件连接到记录时间戳、参与者、请求、策略和结果证据的可观测轨迹事件。
definitions.ja: この関係は、境界通過イベントを、時刻、参加者、要求、ポリシー、結果証跡を記録する観測可能なトレースイベントに結びます。

label: candidate chunk scored by lexical
definition: links a candidate chunk to lexical relevance evidence such as token, term, BM25, TF-IDF, or exact-match score.

definitions.en: links a candidate chunk to lexical relevance evidence such as token, term, BM25, TF-IDF, or exact-match score.
definitions.zh: 候选分块由词汇评分关系把候选分块连接到令牌、词项、词频统计、逆文档频率或精确匹配等词汇相关证据。
definitions.ja: 候補チャンクが語彙で採点される関係は、候補チャンクをトークン、用語、語頻度統計、逆文書頻度、完全一致などの語彙関連証拠へ結び付けます。

label: candidate chunk scored by similarity
definition: links a candidate chunk to semantic similarity evidence such as embedding distance or vector similarity score.

definitions.en: links a candidate chunk to semantic similarity evidence such as embedding distance or vector similarity score.
definitions.zh: 候选分块由相似度评分关系把候选分块连接到嵌入距离或向量相似度等语义相似证据。
definitions.ja: 候補チャンクが類似度で採点される関係は、候補チャンクを埋め込み距離やベクトル類似度などの意味的類似証拠へ結び付けます。

label: candidate set contains chunk
definition: links a retrieval candidate set to an individual candidate chunk considered for scoring, filtering, or selection.

definitions.en: links a retrieval candidate set to an individual candidate chunk considered for scoring, filtering, or selection.
definitions.zh: 候选集合包含分块关系把检索候选集合连接到参与评分、过滤或选择的单个候选分块。
definitions.ja: 候補集合がチャンクを含む関係は、検索候補集合を、採点、フィルタリング、選択の対象となる個別候補チャンクへ結び付けます。

label: capability descriptor describes API operation
definition: connects a capability descriptor to the API operation it describes, including endpoint, method, arguments, result, authorization, and side-effect metadata.

definitions.en: connects a capability descriptor to the API operation it describes, including endpoint, method, arguments, result, authorization, and side-effect metadata.
definitions.zh: 把能力描述符连接到其描述的 API 操作，包括端点、方法、参数、结果、授权和副作用元数据。
definitions.ja: 能力記述子を、それが記述する API 操作へ接続します。端点、メソッド、引数、結果、認可、副作用メタデータを含みます。

label: capability surface advertises descriptor
definition: advertises a capability descriptor from a capability surface so tools, resources, prompts, and API operations can be discovered without flattening them into one type.

definitions.en: advertises a capability descriptor from a capability surface so tools, resources, prompts, and API operations can be discovered without flattening them into one type.
definitions.zh: 从能力表面声明能力描述符，使工具、资源、提示和 API 操作能被发现，同时不被压平成同一种类型。
definitions.ja: 能力サーフェスから能力記述子を公開し、ツール、リソース、プロンプト、API 操作を一つの型へ平坦化せずに発見できるようにします。

label: checkpoint belongs to session
definition: links a checkpoint to the runtime session or thread boundary whose state it preserves.

definitions.en: links a checkpoint to the runtime session or thread boundary whose state it preserves.
definitions.zh: 把检查点连接到它所保存状态所属的运行会话或线程边界。
definitions.ja: チェックポイントを、それが状態を保存する実行セッションまたはスレッド境界へ接続します。

label: checkpoint captures snapshot
definition: links a checkpoint to the state snapshot it saved so resume, branch, time travel, or recovery can start from a known state.

definitions.en: links a checkpoint to the state snapshot it saved so resume, branch, time travel, or recovery can start from a known state.
definitions.zh: 把检查点连接到它保存的状态快照，使恢复、分支、时间回溯或故障恢复能够从已知状态开始。
definitions.ja: チェックポイントを保存した状態スナップショットへ接続し、再開、分岐、時間移動、復旧を既知の状態から始められるようにします。

label: checkpoint has parent
definition: links a checkpoint to the prior checkpoint from which it was derived, enabling checkpoint lineage and branch reconstruction.

definitions.en: links a checkpoint to the prior checkpoint from which it was derived, enabling checkpoint lineage and branch reconstruction.
definitions.zh: 把检查点连接到其派生来源的前一检查点，以支持检查点谱系和分支重建。
definitions.ja: チェックポイントを派生元の前のチェックポイントへ接続し、チェックポイント系譜と分岐復元を可能にします。

label: chunk derived from document
definition: links a chunk to the document or memory source from which it was segmented, preserving source lineage for retrieval and citation.

definitions.en: links a chunk to the document or memory source from which it was segmented, preserving source lineage for retrieval and citation.
definitions.zh: 分块派生自文档关系把分块连接到其被切分出的文档或记忆来源，保留用于检索和引用的来源谱系。
definitions.ja: チャンクが文書から派生する関係は、チャンクを分割元の文書または記憶出典へ結び付け、検索と引用のための出典系譜を保持します。

label: chunk has boundary
definition: links a chunk to its structural boundary such as offset, token span, line range, page range, section break, semantic boundary, or overlap.

definitions.en: links a chunk to its structural boundary such as offset, token span, line range, page range, section break, semantic boundary, or overlap.
definitions.zh: 分块具有边界关系把分块连接到偏移、令牌跨度、行范围、页范围、章节断点、语义边界或重叠等结构边界。
definitions.ja: チャンクが境界を持つ関係は、チャンクをオフセット、トークン範囲、行範囲、ページ範囲、節の切れ目、意味境界、重なりなどの構造境界へ結び付けます。

label: chunk has provenance
definition: links a chunk to provenance evidence covering source version, checksum, ingestion run, transformation history, and document span.

definitions.en: links a chunk to provenance evidence covering source version, checksum, ingestion run, transformation history, and document span.
definitions.zh: 分块具有来源关系把分块连接到覆盖来源版本、校验和、摄入运行、转换历史和文档片段的来源证据。
definitions.ja: チャンクが来歴を持つ関係は、チャンクを出典版、チェックサム、取り込み実行、変換履歴、文書範囲を含む来歴証拠へ結び付けます。

label: chunk reference targets source span
definition: links a chunk reference to the exact source span, anchor, line range, page range, offset, or document version it cites.

definitions.en: links a chunk reference to the exact source span, anchor, line range, page range, offset, or document version it cites.
definitions.zh: 分块引用指向来源片段关系把分块引用连接到其引用的精确来源片段、锚点、行范围、页范围、偏移或文档版本。
definitions.ja: チャンク参照が出典範囲を指す関係は、チャンク参照を引用先の正確な出典範囲、アンカー、行範囲、ページ範囲、オフセット、文書版へ結び付けます。

label: chunking run produces chunk
definition: records that a chunking run produced a retrievable chunk with boundary, overlap, provenance, and situating metadata.

definitions.en: records that a chunking run produced a retrievable chunk with boundary, overlap, provenance, and situating metadata.
definitions.zh: 分块运行产生分块关系记录分块运行产生带有边界、重叠、来源和定位元数据的可检索分块。
definitions.ja: チャンク化実行がチャンクを生成する関係は、境界、重なり、来歴、位置付けメタデータを持つ検索可能なチャンクをチャンク化実行が生成したことを記録します。

label: chunks document
definition: memory relation that breaks a document or output into retrievable chunks

definitions.en: memory relation that breaks a document or output into retrievable chunks
definitions.zh: 对象关系定义域为分块运行，值域为分块；用于表达这两个智能体系统术语之间可验证、可追溯的语义连接。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: オブジェクト関係は、定義域がチャンク化実行、値域がチャンクです。この二つのエージェントシステム用語の検証可能で追跡可能な意味接続を表します。出典 2 件。

label: cites source
definition: links a visible output citation to the precise source span that supports the displayed claim or segment.

definitions.en: links a visible output citation to the precise source span that supports the displayed claim or segment.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

label: closes runtime session
definition: links a session end event to the runtime session it closes, preserving terminal status, cleanup evidence, and artifact references.

definitions.en: links a session end event to the runtime session it closes, preserving terminal status, cleanup evidence, and artifact references.
definitions.zh: 把会话结束事件连接到它关闭的运行会话，保留终端状态、清理证据和产物引用。
definitions.ja: セッション終了イベントを、それが閉じる実行セッションへ接続し、終端状態、クリーンアップ証拠、成果物参照を保存します。

label: commit approval authorizes side effect
definition: links an approval outcome to the bounded side effect it authorizes, preserving scope, approver, policy basis, protected resource, and expiry.

definitions.en: links an approval outcome to the bounded side effect it authorizes, preserving scope, approver, policy basis, protected resource, and expiry.
definitions.zh: 该关系把批准结果连接到其授权的有边界副作用，并保留范围、批准者、策略依据、受保护资源和失效时间。
definitions.ja: この関係は、承認結果を、それが許可した境界づけられた副作用に結び、範囲、承認者、ポリシー根拠、保護対象、有効期限を保持します。

label: commit denial blocks side effect
definition: links a denial outcome to the side effect it blocks, preserving actor, requested operation, protected resource, policy basis, and audit reason.

definitions.en: links a denial outcome to the side effect it blocks, preserving actor, requested operation, protected resource, policy basis, and audit reason.
definitions.zh: 该关系把拒绝结果连接到其阻断的副作用，并保留参与者、请求操作、受保护资源、策略依据和审计原因。
definitions.ja: この関係は、拒否結果を、それが遮断した副作用に結び、参加者、要求操作、保護対象、ポリシー根拠、監査理由を保持します。

label: commit gate emits policy decision
definition: links a commit gate to the policy decision it emits so side-effect approval, denial, escalation, or conditional release is traceable.

definitions.en: links a commit gate to the policy decision it emits so side-effect approval, denial, escalation, or conditional release is traceable.
definitions.zh: 该关系把提交门连接到其产生的策略决策，使副作用批准、拒绝、升级或有条件释放可追踪。
definitions.ja: この関係は、コミットゲートをそれが発行するポリシー判断に結び、副作用の承認、拒否、エスカレーション、条件付き解放を追跡可能にします。

label: commit request evaluated by commit gate
definition: links a requested side effect to the commit gate that evaluates policy, approval, rollback, sandbox, and disclosure requirements before release.

definitions.en: links a requested side effect to the commit gate that evaluates policy, approval, rollback, sandbox, and disclosure requirements before release.
definitions.zh: 该关系把被请求的副作用连接到提交门，该门在释放前评估策略、批准、回滚、沙箱和披露要求。
definitions.ja: この関係は、要求された副作用を、解放前にポリシー、承認、ロールバック、サンドボックス、開示要件を評価するコミットゲートに結びます。

label: compressed into summary
definition: links source content or output to the observable summary used to fit a context budget.

definitions.en: links source content or output to the observable summary used to fit a context budget.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

label: confidence signal qualifies review finding
definition: attaches a ConfidenceSignal to a ReviewFinding so uncertainty, confidence, or evidential strength is explicit in review and evaluation flows.

definitions.en: attaches a ConfidenceSignal to a ReviewFinding so uncertainty, confidence, or evidential strength is explicit in review and evaluation flows.
definitions.zh: 该关系把置信信号附着到审查发现，显式表达不确定性或证据强度。
definitions.ja: この関係は、信頼度信号をレビュー所見に付与し、不確実性または証拠強度を明示します。

label: conflicts with instruction
definition: links two instructions whose requested behavior, scope, or authority cannot both be satisfied.

definitions.en: links two instructions whose requested behavior, scope, or authority cannot both be satisfied.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

label: constrained by budget
definition: links a delegation contract to the token, time, cost, retry, context, or tool-call budget governing delegated work.

definition: links a framework trace mapping to the canonical TraceRecord term used for framework-native runs, traces, spans, streams, checkpoints, and observable events.

definitions.en: links a framework trace mapping to the canonical TraceRecord term used for framework-native runs, traces, spans, streams, checkpoints, and observable events.
definitions.zh: 该关系把框架轨迹映射连接到规范追踪记录术语，用于框架原生运行、追踪、跨度、流、检查点和可观察事件。
definitions.ja: この関係は、フレームワークトレース写像を標準トレース記録用語へ接続し、フレームワーク固有の実行、トレース、スパン、ストリーム、チェックポイント、観測可能イベントを扱います。

label: maps protocol capability to canonical capability
definition: links a protocol capability mapping to the canonical ToolCapability term used for external tool, resource, prompt, service, or agent capability advertisements.

definitions.en: links a protocol capability mapping to the canonical ToolCapability term used for external tool, resource, prompt, service, or agent capability advertisements.
definitions.zh: 该关系把协议能力映射连接到规范工具能力术语，用于外部工具、资源、提示、服务或智能体能力声明。
definitions.ja: この関係は、プロトコル能力写像を標準ツール能力用語へ接続し、外部ツール、資源、プロンプト、サービス、エージェント能力広告を扱います。

label: maps protocol message to canonical message
definition: links a protocol message mapping to the canonical Message term used for protocol-native envelopes, performatives, task messages, or tool-context messages.

definitions.en: links a protocol message mapping to the canonical Message term used for protocol-native envelopes, performatives, task messages, or tool-context messages.
definitions.zh: 该关系把协议消息映射连接到规范消息术语，用于承接协议原生包络、行为词、任务消息或工具上下文消息。
definitions.ja: この関係は、プロトコルメッセージ写像を標準メッセージ用語へ接続し、プロトコル固有の包絡、発話行為、タスクメッセージ、ツール文脈メッセージを扱います。

label: maps protocol task to canonical task
definition: links a protocol task mapping to the canonical Task term used for protocol-native task lifecycle, delegation, or request records.

definitions.en: links a protocol task mapping to the canonical Task term used for protocol-native task lifecycle, delegation, or request records.
definitions.zh: 该关系把协议任务映射连接到规范任务术语，用于协议原生任务生命周期、委派或请求记录。
definitions.ja: この関係は、プロトコルタスク写像を標準タスク用語へ接続し、プロトコル固有のタスクライフサイクル、委任、要求記録を扱います。

label: maps protocol trust to trust boundary
definition: links a protocol trust mapping to the canonical TrustBoundary term used for identity, authorization, opacity, remote-agent, or protected-resource metadata.

definitions.en: links a protocol trust mapping to the canonical TrustBoundary term used for identity, authorization, opacity, remote-agent, or protected-resource metadata.
definitions.zh: 该关系把协议信任映射连接到规范信任边界术语，用于身份、授权、不透明性、远程智能体或受保护资源元数据。
definitions.ja: この関係は、プロトコル信頼写像を標準信頼境界用語へ接続し、識別、認可、不透明性、遠隔エージェント、保護資源メタデータを扱います。

label: maps schema profile to schema artifact
definition: links a schema adapter to the canonical SchemaArtifact term used for JSON Schema, OWL, SHACL, ShEx, Zod, Pydantic, Graph IR, or frontend projection outputs.

definitions.en: links a schema adapter to the canonical SchemaArtifact term used for JSON Schema, OWL, SHACL, ShEx, Zod, Pydantic, Graph IR, or frontend projection outputs.
definitions.zh: 该关系把模式适配器连接到规范模式产物术语，用于 JSON Schema、OWL、SHACL、ShEx、Zod、Pydantic、图谱中间表示或前端投影输出。
definitions.ja: この関係は、スキーマアダプタを標準スキーマ成果物用語へ接続し、JSON Schema、OWL、SHACL、ShEx、Zod、Pydantic、グラフ中間表現、フロントエンド投影出力を扱います。

label: maps statechart state to snapshot
definition: links a statechart adapter to the canonical StateSnapshot term used when state-machine states, snapshots, or lifecycle positions are projected into runtime state profiles.

definitions.en: links a statechart adapter to the canonical StateSnapshot term used when state-machine states, snapshots, or lifecycle positions are projected into runtime state profiles.
definitions.zh: 该关系把状态图适配器连接到规范状态快照术语，用于状态机状态、快照或生命周期位置投影到运行状态剖面时的映射。
definitions.ja: この関係は、状態図アダプタを標準状態スナップショット用語へ接続し、状態機械の状態、スナップショット、ライフサイクル位置を実行状態プロファイルへ投影するときに使います。

label: maps to
definition: legacy summary relation linking adapter family records to canonical terms; precise directional mapping is represented by maps_external_construct_to_canonical and maps_canonical_term_to_external_construct.

definitions.en: legacy summary relation linking adapter family records to canonical terms; precise directional mapping is represented by maps_external_construct_to_canonical and maps_canonical_term_to_external_construct.
definitions.zh: 旧摘要关系把适配器家族记录连接到规范术语；精确的方向性映射由外部构造到规范术语、规范术语到外部构造两类关系表达。
definitions.ja: 旧来の要約関係はアダプタファミリ記録を標準用語へ接続します。厳密な方向付き写像は、外部構成から標準用語への関係、および標準用語から外部構成への関係で表します。

label: matches tool
definition: tool relation that chooses a tool definition for a task or generated call

definitions.en: tool relation that chooses a tool definition for a task or generated call
definitions.zh: 对象关系定义域为工具匹配，值域为工具；用于表达这两个智能体系统术语之间可验证、可追溯的语义连接。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: オブジェクト関係は、定義域がツール照合、値域がツールです。この二つのエージェントシステム用語の検証可能で追跡可能な意味接続を表します。出典 2 件。

label: MCP authorization authorizes prompt get
definition: authorizes an MCP prompt retrieval request using protocol-side consent, grant, approval, scope, protected resource, or host policy metadata.

definitions.en: authorizes an MCP prompt retrieval request using protocol-side consent, grant, approval, scope, protected resource, or host policy metadata.
definitions.zh: 用协议侧同意、授权、审批、范围、受保护资源或宿主策略元数据授权 MCP 提示获取请求。
definitions.ja: プロトコル側の同意、付与、承認、スコープ、保護資源、ホストポリシーメタデータにより MCP プロンプト取得要求を認可します。

label: MCP authorization authorizes resource read
definition: authorizes an MCP resource read request using protocol-side consent, grant, approval, scope, protected resource, or host policy metadata.

definitions.en: authorizes an MCP resource read request using protocol-side consent, grant, approval, scope, protected resource, or host policy metadata.
definitions.zh: 用协议侧同意、授权、审批、范围、受保护资源或宿主策略元数据授权 MCP 资源读取请求。
definitions.ja: プロトコル側の同意、付与、承認、スコープ、保護資源、ホストポリシーメタデータにより MCP リソース読み取り要求を認可します。

label: MCP authorization authorizes tool call
definition: authorizes an MCP tool call using protocol-side consent, grant, approval, scope, protected resource, or host policy metadata.

definitions.en: authorizes an MCP tool call using protocol-side consent, grant, approval, scope, protected resource, or host policy metadata.
definitions.zh: 用协议侧同意、授权、审批、范围、受保护资源或宿主策略元数据授权 MCP 工具调用。
definitions.ja: プロトコル側の同意、付与、承認、スコープ、保護資源、ホストポリシーメタデータにより MCP ツール呼び出しを認可します。

label: MCP authorization maps to authorization grant
definition: links MCP authorization metadata or flow output to the canonical authorization grant that records scope, actor, resource, expiry, and audit basis.

definitions.en: links MCP authorization metadata or flow output to the canonical authorization grant that records scope, actor, resource, expiry, and audit basis.
definitions.zh: 该关系把 MCP 授权元数据或授权流程输出连接到记录范围、参与者、资源、失效时间和审计依据的规范授权授予。
definitions.ja: この関係は、MCP認可メタデータまたはフロー出力を、範囲、参加者、リソース、有効期限、監査根拠を記録する標準認可付与に結びます。

label: MCP client opens session
definition: links an MCP client to the session it opens with a server for capability discovery, authorization, tool calls, resource reads, prompts, and elicitation.

definitions.en: links an MCP client to the session it opens with a server for capability discovery, authorization, tool calls, resource reads, prompts, and elicitation.
definitions.zh: 把 MCP 客户端连接到它与服务器打开的会话，用于能力发现、授权、工具调用、资源读取、提示和补充信息请求。
definitions.ja: MCP クライアントを、能力発見、認可、ツール呼び出し、リソース読み取り、プロンプト、追加情報要求のためにサーバーと開くセッションへ接続します。

label: MCP elicitation requests additional input
definition: records that MCP elicitation requests additional input from a user or client before the server can continue a protocol interaction.

definitions.en: records that MCP elicitation requests additional input from a user or client before the server can continue a protocol interaction.
definitions.zh: 记录 MCP 补充信息请求 在服务器继续协议交互前向用户或客户端请求补充输入。
definitions.ja: MCP 追加情報要求 が、サーバーがプロトコル対話を続ける前にユーザーまたはクライアントへ追加入力を求めることを記録します。

label: MCP prompt list contains prompt definition
definition: contains a prompt definition in an MCP prompt list, preserving the distinction between prompt discovery and instantiated prompt messages.

definitions.en: contains a prompt definition in an MCP prompt list, preserving the distinction between prompt discovery and instantiated prompt messages.
definitions.zh: 表示 MCP 提示列表包含某个提示定义，并保持提示发现和已实例化提示消息之间的区别。
definitions.ja: MCP プロンプト一覧がプロンプト定義を含むことを示し、プロンプト発見とインスタンス化済みプロンプトメッセージの区別を保ちます。

label: MCP resource list contains resource definition
definition: contains a resource definition in an MCP resource list, preserving the distinction between resource discovery and resource read results.

definitions.en: contains a resource definition in an MCP resource list, preserving the distinction between resource discovery and resource read results.
definitions.zh: 表示 MCP 资源列表包含某个资源定义，并保持资源发现和资源读取结果之间的区别。
definitions.ja: MCP リソース一覧がリソース定義を含むことを示し、リソース発見とリソース読み取り結果の区別を保ちます。

label: MCP server exposes prompt list
definition: exposes the server-side MCP prompt list from an MCP server so clients can retrieve reusable prompt definitions and templates.

definitions.en: exposes the server-side MCP prompt list from an MCP server so clients can retrieve reusable prompt definitions and templates.
definitions.zh: 表示 MCP 服务器暴露服务器侧提示列表，使客户端能获取可复用提示定义和模板。
definitions.ja: MCP サーバーがサーバー側のプロンプト一覧を公開し、クライアントが再利用可能なプロンプト定義とテンプレートを取得できるようにします。

label: MCP server exposes resource list
definition: exposes the server-side MCP resource list from an MCP server so clients can discover readable or subscribable context/data resources.

definitions.en: exposes the server-side MCP resource list from an MCP server so clients can discover readable or subscribable context/data resources.
definitions.zh: 表示 MCP 服务器暴露服务器侧资源列表，使客户端能发现可读取或可订阅的上下文/数据资源。
definitions.ja: MCP サーバーがサーバー側のリソース一覧を公開し、クライアントが読み取り可能または購読可能な文脈/データ資源を発見できるようにします。

label: MCP server exposes tool list
definition: exposes the server-side MCP tool list from an MCP server so clients can discover callable tool definitions and capability descriptors.

definitions.en: exposes the server-side MCP tool list from an MCP server so clients can discover callable tool definitions and capability descriptors.
definitions.zh: 表示 MCP 服务器暴露服务器侧工具列表，使客户端能发现可调用工具定义和能力描述符。
definitions.ja: MCP サーバーがサーバー側のツール一覧を公開し、クライアントが呼び出し可能なツール定義と能力記述子を発見できるようにします。

label: MCP session uses transport
definition: links an MCP session to the transport channel used to exchange protocol messages, requests, responses, and capability metadata.

definitions.en: links an MCP session to the transport channel used to exchange protocol messages, requests, responses, and capability metadata.
definitions.zh: 把 MCP 会话连接到用于交换协议消息、请求、响应和能力元数据的传输通道。
definitions.ja: MCP セッションを、プロトコルメッセージ、要求、応答、能力メタデータを交換するトランスポート経路へ接続します。

label: memory audit event records memory operation
definition: links a memory audit event to the memory record read, written, updated, validated, deleted, exported, or reused.

definitions.en: links a memory audit event to the memory record read, written, updated, validated, deleted, exported, or reused.
definitions.zh: 记忆审计事件记录记忆操作关系把记忆审计事件连接到被读取、写入、更新、验证、删除、导出或复用的记忆记录。
definitions.ja: 記憶監査イベントが記憶操作を記録する関係は、記憶監査イベントを読み取り、書き込み、更新、検証、削除、エクスポート、再利用された記憶レコードへ結び付けます。

label: chunking and situating module contains
definition: declares chunk and sibling terms as members of the Chunking And Situating module scope.

definitions.en: declares chunk and sibling terms as members of the Chunking And Situating module scope.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词声明该模块包含的核心类及同级术语，用于维持模块组成结构。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、モジュールに含まれる主要クラスと同階層用語を宣言し、構成を保ちます。

label: memory compaction compacts record
definition: records that memory compaction shortened or folded a memory record while preserving source anchors and retrieval utility.

definitions.en: records that memory compaction shortened or folded a memory record while preserving source anchors and retrieval utility.
definitions.zh: 记忆压缩压缩记录关系记录记忆压缩在保留来源锚点和检索效用的同时缩短或折叠记忆记录。
definitions.ja: 記憶圧縮がレコードを圧縮する関係は、出典アンカーと検索有用性を保ちながら記憶レコードを短縮または折り畳んだことを記録します。

label: memory conflict flags record
definition: links a memory conflict to the record whose claim, preference, policy, source, or instruction contradicts another active memory or current context.

definitions.en: links a memory conflict to the record whose claim, preference, policy, source, or instruction contradicts another active memory or current context.
definitions.zh: 记忆冲突标记记录关系把记忆冲突连接到其主张、偏好、策略、来源或指令与另一活动记忆或当前上下文矛盾的记录。
definitions.ja: 記憶衝突がレコードを標識する関係は、主張、選好、方針、出典、指示が別のアクティブ記憶または現在の文脈と矛盾するレコードへ記憶衝突を結び付けます。

label: memory consolidation merges records
definition: links memory consolidation to the records it distills into a summary, semantic memory, reflective memory, or procedure.

definitions.en: links memory consolidation to the records it distills into a summary, semantic memory, reflective memory, or procedure.
definitions.zh: 记忆巩固合并记录关系把记忆巩固连接到被提炼为摘要、语义记忆、反思记忆或流程的记录。
definitions.ja: 記憶集約がレコードを統合する関係は、記憶集約を要約、意味記憶、反省記憶、手順へ蒸留されるレコードへ結び付けます。

label: memory consolidation produces summary
definition: records that memory consolidation produced a context summary from observations, episodes, records, feedback, or outcomes.

definitions.en: records that memory consolidation produced a context summary from observations, episodes, records, feedback, or outcomes.
definitions.zh: 记忆巩固产生摘要关系记录记忆巩固从观测、情景、记录、反馈或结果中产生上下文摘要。
definitions.ja: 記憶集約が要約を生成する関係は、観測、エピソード、レコード、フィードバック、結果からコンテキスト要約を生成したことを記録します。

label: context assembly module contains
definition: declares context assembly and sibling terms as members of the Context Assembly module scope.

definitions.en: declares context assembly and sibling terms as members of the Context Assembly module scope.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词声明该模块包含的核心类及同级术语，用于维持模块组成结构。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、モジュールに含まれる主要クラスと同階層用語を宣言し、構成を保ちます。

label: memory decay lowers record priority
definition: records that memory decay lowered a record's freshness, priority, confidence, or retrieval weight over time or after contradictory evidence.

definitions.en: records that memory decay lowered a record's freshness, priority, confidence, or retrieval weight over time or after contradictory evidence.
definitions.zh: 记忆衰减降低记录优先级关系记录记忆衰减随时间或矛盾证据降低记录的新鲜度、优先级、置信度或检索权重。
definitions.ja: 記憶減衰がレコード優先度を下げる関係は、時間または矛盾証拠の後にレコードの新鮮度、優先度、信頼度、検索重みを下げたことを記録します。

label: memory delete removes record
definition: records that a memory delete operation removed or disabled a memory record under privacy, retention, or user-request policy.

definitions.en: records that a memory delete operation removed or disabled a memory record under privacy, retention, or user-request policy.
definitions.zh: 记忆删除移除记录关系记录记忆删除操作在隐私、保留或用户请求策略下移除或禁用记忆记录。
definitions.ja: 記憶削除がレコードを取り除く関係は、プライバシー、保持、ユーザー要求の方針の下で記憶削除操作が記憶レコードを除去または無効化したことを記録します。

label: memory discard rejects item
definition: records that a candidate memory item was rejected before persistence because it was irrelevant, unsafe, duplicate, stale, low confidence, or out of scope.

definitions.en: records that a candidate memory item was rejected before persistence because it was irrelevant, unsafe, duplicate, stale, low confidence, or out of scope.
definitions.zh: 记忆丢弃拒绝记忆项关系记录候选记忆项因无关、不安全、重复、陈旧、低置信度或超出范围而在持久化前被拒绝。
definitions.ja: 記憶破棄が項目を拒否する関係は、候補記憶項目が無関係、安全でない、重複、古い、低信頼、範囲外のため永続化前に拒否されたことを記録します。

label: embedding and index module contains
definition: declares dense vector and sibling terms as members of the Embedding And Index module scope.

definitions.en: declares dense vector and sibling terms as members of the Embedding And Index module scope.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词声明该模块包含的核心类及同级术语，用于维持模块组成结构。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、モジュールに含まれる主要クラスと同階層用語を宣言し、構成を保ちます。

label: memory eviction evicts record
definition: records that memory eviction removed or deprioritized a record from an active store, cache, or candidate pool because of capacity, staleness, or policy.

definitions.en: records that memory eviction removed or deprioritized a record from an active store, cache, or candidate pool because of capacity, staleness, or policy.
definitions.zh: 记忆驱逐驱逐记录关系记录记忆驱逐因容量、陈旧性或策略从活动库、缓存或候选池移除或降低记录优先级。
definitions.ja: 記憶退避がレコードを退避する関係は、容量、古さ、方針により、アクティブストア、キャッシュ、候補プールからレコードを除去または低優先化したことを記録します。

label: memory expiration expires record
definition: records that a memory record, summary, index entry, or retention window expired under time, consent, scope, or retention policy.

definitions.en: records that a memory record, summary, index entry, or retention window expired under time, consent, scope, or retention policy.
definitions.zh: 记忆过期使记录过期关系记录记忆记录、摘要、索引条目或保留窗口根据时间、同意、范围或保留策略过期。
definitions.ja: 記憶期限切れがレコードを期限切れにする関係は、時間、同意、スコープ、保持方針により記憶レコード、要約、索引項目、保持ウィンドウが期限切れになったことを記録します。

label: memory file materializes record
definition: records that a file-backed memory surface materializes a durable memory record such as a convention, note, plan, or preference.

definitions.en: records that a file-backed memory surface materializes a durable memory record such as a convention, note, plan, or preference.
definitions.zh: 记忆文件实现记录关系记录文件承载的记忆表面把约定、笔记、计划或偏好等持久记忆记录具体化。
definitions.ja: 記憶ファイルがレコードを具現化する関係は、ファイルベースの記憶面が規約、メモ、計画、選好などの永続記憶レコードを具現化することを記録します。

label: memory ingestion module contains
definition: declares database and sibling terms as members of the Memory Ingestion module scope.

definitions.en: declares database and sibling terms as members of the Memory Ingestion module scope.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词声明该模块包含的核心类及同级术语，用于维持模块组成结构。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、モジュールに含まれる主要クラスと同階層用語を宣言し、構成を保ちます。

label: memory lifecycle operations module contains
definition: declares memory audit event and sibling terms as members of the Memory Lifecycle Operations module scope.

definitions.en: declares memory audit event and sibling terms as members of the Memory Lifecycle Operations module scope.
definitions.zh: 该关系声明记忆审计事件及其同级术语属于记忆生命周期操作模块。

definitions.ja: この関係は、副作用を、承認後または失敗後に補償、戻し、削除、失効、中和できるロールバックアクションに結びます。

label: side effect produced by network call
definition: links a persistent or external side effect to the network call that produced or attempted it under egress and credential policy.

definitions.en: links a persistent or external side effect to the network call that produced or attempted it under egress and credential policy.
definitions.zh: 该关系把持久化或外部可见副作用连接到在出口与凭据策略下产生或尝试产生它的网络调用。
definitions.ja: この関係は、永続的または外部可視の副作用を、送信および資格情報ポリシーのもとでそれを生成または試行したネットワーク呼び出しに結びます。

label: side effect produced by sandbox command
definition: links a persistent or external side effect to the sandbox command that produced or attempted it under execution policy.

definitions.en: links a persistent or external side effect to the sandbox command that produced or attempted it under execution policy.
definitions.zh: 该关系把持久化或外部可见副作用连接到在执行策略下产生或尝试产生它的沙箱命令。
definitions.ja: この関係は、永続的または外部可視の副作用を、実行ポリシーのもとでそれを生成または試行したサンドボックスコマンドに結びます。

label: side effect produced by tool call
definition: links a persistent or external side effect to the tool call that produced or attempted it, keeping tool execution distinct from commit authorization.

definitions.en: links a persistent or external side effect to the tool call that produced or attempted it, keeping tool execution distinct from commit authorization.
definitions.zh: 该关系把持久化或外部可见副作用连接到产生或尝试产生它的工具调用，使工具执行与提交授权保持区分。
definitions.ja: この関係は、永続的または外部可視の副作用を、それを生成または試行したツール呼び出しに結び、ツール実行とコミット認可を区別します。

label: source reference belongs to data zone
definition: links a source reference to the data zone that governs its classification, trust, retention, memory use, tool exposure, and disclosure routing.

definitions.en: links a source reference to the data zone that governs its classification, trust, retention, memory use, tool exposure, and disclosure routing.
definitions.zh: 该关系把来源引用连接到治理其分类、信任、保留、记忆使用、工具暴露和披露路由的数据区。
definitions.ja: この関係は、出典参照を、その分類、信頼、保持、メモリ利用、ツール公開、開示経路を統制するデータ区域に結びます。

label: span contains event
definition: links a trace span to timestamped events such as model calls, tool calls, handoffs, warnings, state updates, or artifact updates.

definitions.en: links a trace span to timestamped events such as model calls, tool calls, handoffs, warnings, state updates, or artifact updates.
definitions.zh: 把追踪跨度连接到带时间戳的事件，例如模型调用、工具调用、移交、警告、状态更新或产物更新。
definitions.ja: トレーススパンを、モデル呼び出し、ツール呼び出し、引き継ぎ、警告、状態更新、成果物更新などの時刻付きイベントへ接続します。

label: span has attribute
definition: links a trace span to keyed observable metadata such as operation name, model or tool identity, token use, latency, status detail, or boundary tag.

definitions.en: links a trace span to keyed observable metadata such as operation name, model or tool identity, token use, latency, status detail, or boundary tag.
definitions.zh: 把追踪跨度连接到键值化可观测元数据，例如操作名称、模型或工具身份、词元用量、延迟、状态细节或边界标签。
definitions.ja: トレーススパンを、操作名、モデルまたはツール識別、トークン使用量、遅延、状態詳細、境界タグなどのキー付き観測メタデータへ接続します。

label: span has parent span
definition: links a span to its parent span, forming the nested trace tree used to reconstruct execution order and causal containment.

definitions.en: links a span to its parent span, forming the nested trace tree used to reconstruct execution order and causal containment.
definitions.zh: 把一个跨度连接到其父跨度，形成用于重建执行顺序和因果包含关系的嵌套追踪树。
definitions.ja: スパンを親スパンへ接続し、実行順序と因果的包含を復元するための入れ子トレース木を形成します。

label: span has status
definition: links a trace span to its status record so errors, cancellation, blocking, retry, or degraded execution can be inspected without reinterpretation.

definitions.en: links a trace span to its status record so errors, cancellation, blocking, retry, or degraded execution can be inspected without reinterpretation.
definitions.zh: 把追踪跨度连接到其状态记录，使错误、取消、阻断、重试或降级执行能够被直接检查而无需重新解释。
definitions.ja: トレーススパンを状態記録へ接続し、エラー、取消、ブロック、再試行、劣化実行を再解釈なしに検査できるようにします。

label: stages output as
definition: flow relation that turns command, tool, or model output into bounded chunks or visible windows

definitions.en: flow relation that turns command, tool, or model output into bounded chunks or visible windows
definitions.zh: 对象关系定义域为命令执行，值域为输出分块；用于表达这两个智能体系统术语之间可验证、可追溯的语义连接。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: オブジェクト関係は、定義域がコマンド実行、値域が出力チャンクです。この二つのエージェントシステム用語の検証可能で追跡可能な意味接続を表します。出典 2 件。

label: state diff from snapshot
definition: links a state diff to the source snapshot whose values, channels, artifacts, or lifecycle position are being compared.

definitions.en: links a state diff to the source snapshot whose values, channels, artifacts, or lifecycle position are being compared.
definitions.zh: 把状态差异连接到被比较的源快照，该快照提供变化前的值、通道、产物或生命周期位置。
definitions.ja: 状態差分を比較元スナップショットへ接続し、変更前の値、チャネル、成果物、ライフサイクル位置を示します。

label: state diff to snapshot
definition: links a state diff to the target snapshot that shows the resulting values, channels, artifacts, or lifecycle position after change.

definitions.en: links a state diff to the target snapshot that shows the resulting values, channels, artifacts, or lifecycle position after change.
definitions.zh: 把状态差异连接到变化后的目标快照，该快照显示结果值、通道、产物或生命周期位置。
definitions.ja: 状態差分を変更後の対象スナップショットへ接続し、結果の値、チャネル、成果物、ライフサイクル位置を示します。

label: success criterion evaluates task
definition: links a SuccessCriterion to the Task whose completion, acceptance, recovery, or evaluation outcome it helps judge.

definitions.en: links a SuccessCriterion to the Task whose completion, acceptance, recovery, or evaluation outcome it helps judge.
definitions.zh: 该关系把成功准则连接到其用于判断的任务。
definitions.ja: この関係は、成功基準を、それが判断に使われるタスクへ結びます。

label: summarized as context input
definition: links execution output to the summary that carries it forward under context budget limits.

definitions.en: links execution output to the summary that carries it forward under context budget limits.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

label: summarizes
definition: links a compression or synthesis event to the shorter context, disclosure, or artifact it creates.

definitions.en: links a compression or synthesis event to the shorter context, disclosure, or artifact it creates.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

label: suppressed by rule
definition: links suppressed context or output to the disclosure, redaction, privacy, safety, or boundary rule that withheld it.

definitions.en: links suppressed context or output to the disclosure, redaction, privacy, safety, or boundary rule that withheld it.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

label: synthesizes from input
definition: links a synthesis event to the worker output, retrieved evidence, vote, tool result, or feedback input it consumes.

definitions.en: links a synthesis event to the worker output, retrieved evidence, vote, tool result, or feedback input it consumes.
definitions.zh: 综合输入关系把综合事件连接到其消费的工作者输出、检索证据、投票、工具结果或反馈输入。
definitions.ja: 統合入力関係は、統合イベントを、その消費する作業者出力、検索証拠、投票、道具結果、フィードバック入力へ結びます。

label: telemetry event derived from trace event
definition: records that a TelemetryEvent is derived from raw runtime TraceEvent evidence rather than acting as a second source of runtime truth.

definitions.en: records that a TelemetryEvent is derived from raw runtime TraceEvent evidence rather than acting as a second source of runtime truth.
definitions.zh: 该关系说明遥测事件派生自原始轨迹事件，而不是第二套运行事实。
definitions.ja: この関係は、テレメトリイベントが生のトレースイベントから派生し、別の実行事実ではないことを示します。

label: telemetry event emitted to log stream
definition: emits a derived TelemetryEvent into a LogStream so monitoring, metrics, diagnostics, audit, or export consumers can process it.

definitions.en: emits a derived TelemetryEvent into a LogStream so monitoring, metrics, diagnostics, audit, or export consumers can process it.
definitions.zh: 该关系把派生遥测事件发送到日志流，供监控、指标、诊断、审计或导出消费。
definitions.ja: この関係は、派生テレメトリイベントをログストリームへ送出し、監視、指標、診断、監査、エクスポートで処理できるようにします。

label: terminates on condition
definition: links stop-retry lineage to the stop condition that ended a loop, branch, retry sequence, or delegated attempt.

definitions.en: links stop-retry lineage to the stop condition that ended a loop, branch, retry sequence, or delegated attempt.
definitions.zh: 停止条件关系把停止重试脉络连接到终止循环、分支、重试序列或委派尝试的停止条件。
definitions.ja: 停止条件関係は、停止再試行系譜を、ループ、分岐、再試行列、委任試行を終えた停止条件へ結びます。

label: tool argument conforms to schema
definition: records schema conformance between a constructed tool argument and the argument schema declared by the tool definition.

definitions.en: records schema conformance between a constructed tool argument and the argument schema declared by the tool definition.
definitions.zh: 记录构造出的工具参数与工具定义声明的参数 Schema 之间的符合关系。
definitions.ja: 構築済みツール引数とツール定義が宣言する引数スキーマとのスキーマ適合を記録します。

label: tool call attempt belongs to trace span
definition: links a concrete tool call attempt to the trace span that bounds its duration, retries, attributes, and status.

definitions.en: links a concrete tool call attempt to the trace span that bounds its duration, retries, attributes, and status.
definitions.zh: 把具体工具调用尝试连接到限定其持续时间、重试、属性和状态的 追踪 跨度。
definitions.ja: 具体的なツール呼び出し試行を、その期間、再試行、属性、状態を囲む 追跡 期間 へ接続します。

label: tool call emits trace event
definition: records the observable trace event emitted by a tool call, preserving timing, actor, selected tool, arguments, result, and policy evidence.

definitions.en: records the observable trace event emitted by a tool call, preserving timing, actor, selected tool, arguments, result, and policy evidence.
definitions.zh: 记录工具调用发出的可观察 追踪事件，保留时间、参与者、所选工具、参数、结果和策略证据。
definitions.ja: ツール呼び出しが発する観測可能な 追跡イベント を記録し、時刻、アクター、選択ツール、引数、結果、ポリシー証拠を保持します。

label: tool call evaluated by policy decision
definition: links a tool call to the policy decision that allowed, denied, escalated, sandboxed, or constrained execution before side effects occur.

definitions.en: links a tool call to the policy decision that allowed, denied, escalated, sandboxed, or constrained execution before side effects occur.
definitions.zh: 该关系把工具调用连接到在副作用发生前允许、拒绝、升级、沙箱化或限制执行的策略决策。
definitions.ja: この関係は、ツール呼び出しを、副作用が発生する前に実行を許可、拒否、エスカレーション、サンドボックス化、制約したポリシー判断に結びます。

label: tool call executes in sandbox
definition: links a tool call to the sandbox boundary used to constrain process, filesystem, network, credential, and side-effect behavior during execution.

definitions.en: links a tool call to the sandbox boundary used to constrain process, filesystem, network, credential, and side-effect behavior during execution.
definitions.zh: 该关系把工具调用连接到执行时约束进程、文件系统、网络、凭据和副作用行为的沙箱边界。
definitions.ja: この関係は、ツール呼び出しを、実行中のプロセス、ファイルシステム、ネットワーク、資格情報、副作用を制約するサンドボックス境界に結びます。

label: tool call has attempt
definition: links a tool call to one concrete execution attempt so retries, failures, latency, side effects, and trace evidence remain separable.

definitions.en: links a tool call to one concrete execution attempt so retries, failures, latency, side effects, and trace evidence remain separable.
definitions.zh: 把工具调用连接到某次具体执行尝试，使重试、失败、延迟、副作用和 追踪 证据保持可区分。
definitions.ja: ツール呼び出しを具体的な実行試行へ接続し、再試行、失敗、遅延、副作用、トレース証拠を分離して扱えるようにします。

label: tool call requires permission scope
definition: links a tool call to the permission scope describing requested operation, protected resource, actor, data zone, trust boundary, duration, and side effects.

definitions.en: links a tool call to the permission scope describing requested operation, protected resource, actor, data zone, trust boundary, duration, and side effects.
definitions.zh: 该关系把工具调用连接到权限作用域，说明请求操作、受保护资源、参与者、数据区、信任边界、持续时间和副作用。
definitions.ja: この関係は、ツール呼び出しを、要求操作、保護対象、参加者、データ区域、信頼境界、期間、副作用を記述する権限スコープに結びます。

label: tool call retry retries attempt
definition: connects a retry event to the previous tool call attempt that it retries, including retry cause and bounded retry policy.

definitions.en: connects a retry event to the previous tool call attempt that it retries, including retry cause and bounded retry policy.
definitions.zh: 把重试事件连接到其重试的上一次工具调用尝试，并保留重试原因和有界重试策略。
definitions.ja: 再試行イベントを、再試行対象となる前回のツール呼び出し試行へ接続し、再試行理由と有界再試行ポリシーを保持します。

label: tool call uses argument
definition: links a tool call to the structured argument object supplied to the invocation and validated against the tool definition.

definitions.en: links a tool call to the structured argument object supplied to the invocation and validated against the tool definition.
definitions.zh: 把工具调用连接到提供给调用并依据工具定义校验的结构化参数对象。
definitions.ja: ツール呼び出しを、呼び出しに渡されツール定義で検証される構造化引数オブジェクトへ接続します。

label: tool candidate ranked by match
definition: links a candidate tool to matching or ranking evidence such as embedding similarity, regex match, policy filter, or task fit score.

definitions.en: links a candidate tool to matching or ranking evidence such as embedding similarity, regex match, policy filter, or task fit score.
definitions.zh: 把工具候选连接到匹配或排序证据，例如 嵌入表示 相似度、正则匹配、策略过滤或任务适配分数。
definitions.ja: 候補ツールを、埋め込み類似度、正規表現一致、ポリシーフィルタ、タスク適合スコアなどの照合または順位付け証拠へ接続します。

label: tool candidate set contains candidate
definition: contains an individual tool candidate inside the candidate set returned by search, filtering, or protocol discovery.

definitions.en: contains an individual tool candidate inside the candidate set returned by search, filtering, or protocol discovery.
definitions.zh: 表示搜索、过滤或协议发现返回的候选集中包含某个单独工具候选。
definitions.ja: 検索、フィルタリング、プロトコル発見が返した候補集合の中に個別ツール候補が含まれることを示します。

label: tool definition declares permission
definition: links a tool definition to the tool-side permission declaration that states required scopes, approvals, protected resources, and safety hooks.

definitions.en: links a tool definition to the tool-side permission declaration that states required scopes, approvals, protected resources, and safety hooks.
definitions.zh: 把工具定义连接到工具侧权限声明，说明所需 范围、审批、受保护资源和安全挂钩点。
definitions.ja: ツール定義を、必要なスコープ、承認、保護資源、安全フックを示すツール側権限宣言へ接続します。

label: tool definition defines tool
definition: links a schema-like tool definition to the callable tool object whose identity, arguments, result, permissions, and constraints it describes.

definitions.en: links a schema-like tool definition to the callable tool object whose identity, arguments, result, permissions, and constraints it describes.
definitions.zh: 把 Schema 化工具定义连接到它所描述的可调用工具对象，包括身份、参数、结果、权限和约束。
definitions.ja: スキーマ状のツール定義を、それが記述する呼び出し可能ツールオブジェクトへ接続します。対象には識別、引数、結果、権限、制約が含まれます。

label: tool definition deprecated by
definition: links a tool definition to the deprecation notice that explains replacement, removal, risk, or migration guidance.

definitions.en: links a tool definition to the deprecation notice that explains replacement, removal, risk, or migration guidance.
definitions.zh: 把工具定义连接到弃用通知，用于说明替代项、移除、风险或迁移指导。
definitions.ja: ツール定義を、代替、削除、リスク、移行指針を説明する非推奨通知へ接続します。

label: tool definition has argument schema
definition: links a tool definition to the argument schema used to validate constructed arguments before invocation.

definitions.en: links a tool definition to the argument schema used to validate constructed arguments before invocation.
definitions.zh: 把工具定义连接到调用前用于校验构造参数的参数 Schema。
definitions.ja: ツール定義を、呼び出し前に構築済み引数を検証するための引数スキーマへ接続します。

label: tool definition has result schema
definition: links a tool definition to the result schema used to interpret observable tool output, errors, warnings, and artifacts.

definitions.en: links a tool definition to the result schema used to interpret observable tool output, errors, warnings, and artifacts.
definitions.zh: 把工具定义连接到用于解释工具可观察输出、错误、警告和产物的结果 Schema。
definitions.ja: ツール定義を、観測可能なツール出力、エラー、警告、成果物を解釈する結果スキーマへ接続します。

label: tool definition has version
definition: links a tool definition to its version record so clients can distinguish compatible schema, behavior, and deprecation state.

definitions.en: links a tool definition to its version record so clients can distinguish compatible schema, behavior, and deprecation state.
definitions.zh: 把工具定义连接到版本记录，使客户端能区分兼容 Schema、行为和弃用状态。
definitions.ja: ツール定義を版記録へ接続し、クライアントが互換スキーマ、挙動、非推奨状態を区別できるようにします。

label: tool description trust bounds tool definition
definition: links tool-description trust evidence to the tool definition whose annotation, description, schema, or server origin constrains safe use.

definitions.en: links tool-description trust evidence to the tool definition whose annotation, description, schema, or server origin constrains safe use.
definitions.zh: 把工具描述信任证据连接到工具定义，说明其注解、描述、Schema 或服务器来源如何约束安全使用。
definitions.ja: ツール記述信頼証拠をツール定義へ接続し、その注釈、説明、スキーマ、サーバー由来が安全利用をどのように制約するかを示します。

label: capability discovery and selection module contains
definition: declares capability candidate and sibling terms as members of the Capability Discovery And Selection module scope.

definitions.en: declares capability candidate and sibling terms as members of the Capability Discovery And Selection module scope.
definitions.zh: 声明能力候选及同组术语属于能力发现与选择模块的成员范围。
definitions.ja: 能力候補と同族の用語が能力発見と選択モジュールの範囲に属することを示します。

label: capability discovery and selection module emits event
definition: connects operations in the Capability Discovery And Selection module to observable TraceEvent records.

definitions.en: connects operations in the Capability Discovery And Selection module to observable TraceEvent records.
definitions.zh: 把能力发现与选择模块中的操作连接到可观察 追踪事件 记录。
definitions.ja: 能力発見と選択モジュール内の操作を観測可能な 追跡イベント 記録へ接続します。

label: capability discovery and selection module relates
definition: connects capability candidate to capability selection decision when both participate in model tool, resource, prompt, and capability search, matching, ranking, selection, disambiguation, filtering, and fallback.

definitions.en: connects capability candidate to capability selection decision when both participate in model tool, resource, prompt, and capability search, matching, ranking, selection, disambiguation, filtering, and fallback.
definitions.zh: 在能力发现与选择模块中，把能力候选连接到能力选择决策，表示它们参与搜索、匹配、排序、过滤、消歧、选择和回退。
definitions.ja: 能力発見と選択モジュールにおいて、能力候補を能力選択判断へ接続し、検索、照合、順位付け、フィルタリング、曖昧性解消、選択、フォールバックへ関与することを示します。

label: tool error caused by attempt
definition: connects a tool error diagnostic to the tool call attempt that produced the failure, timeout, validation error, or exception.

definitions.en: connects a tool error diagnostic to the tool call attempt that produced the failure, timeout, validation error, or exception.
definitions.zh: 把工具错误诊断连接到产生失败、超时、校验错误或异常的工具调用尝试。
definitions.ja: ツールエラー診断を、失敗、タイムアウト、検証エラー、例外を生んだツール呼び出し試行へ接続します。

label: tool fallback replaces tool
definition: connects a fallback choice to the tool it replaces when the original tool is unavailable, unsafe, deprecated, or unsuitable.

definitions.en: connects a fallback choice to the tool it replaces when the original tool is unavailable, unsafe, deprecated, or unsuitable.
definitions.zh: 当原工具不可用、不安全、已弃用或不适合时，把回退选择连接到被替换的工具。
definitions.ja: 元のツールが利用不能、危険、非推奨、不適合な場合に、フォールバック選択を置き換え対象のツールへ接続します。

label: tool invocation candidate checked by safety check
definition: checks a candidate tool invocation with a pre-execution safety check before the call can proceed to execution or approval.

definitions.en: checks a candidate tool invocation with a pre-execution safety check before the call can proceed to execution or approval.
definitions.zh: 在调用进入执行或审批前，用执行前安全检查评估候选工具调用。
definitions.ja: 呼び出しが実行または承認へ進む前に、候補ツール呼び出しを実行前安全確認で検査します。

label: invocation and execution module contains
definition: declares command and sibling terms as members of the Invocation And Execution module scope.

definitions.en: declares command and sibling terms as members of the Invocation And Execution module scope.
definitions.zh: 声明命令及同组术语属于调用与执行模块的成员范围。
definitions.ja: コマンドと同族の用語が呼び出しと実行モジュールの範囲に属することを示します。

label: invocation and execution module emits event
definition: connects operations in the Invocation And Execution module to observable TraceEvent records.

definitions.en: connects operations in the Invocation And Execution module to observable TraceEvent records.
definitions.zh: 把调用与执行模块中的操作连接到可观察 追踪事件 记录。
definitions.ja: 呼び出しと実行モジュール内の操作を観測可能な 追跡イベント 記録へ接続します。

label: invocation and execution module relates
definition: connects command to command area when both participate in model tool calls, resource reads, prompt retrieval and instantiation, programmatic calls, command execution requests, observable results, diagnostics, side effects, transcripts, and pre-execution safety checks.

definitions.en: connects command to command area when both participate in model tool calls, resource reads, prompt retrieval and instantiation, programmatic calls, command execution requests, observable results, diagnostics, side effects, transcripts, and pre-execution safety checks.
definitions.zh: 在调用与执行模块中，把命令连接到命令区域，表示它们参与工具调用、资源读取、提示获取与实例化、程序化调用、命令执行、结果、诊断、副作用、转录和执行前安全检查。
definitions.ja: 呼び出しと実行モジュールにおいて、コマンドをコマンド領域へ接続し、ツール呼び出し、リソース読み取り、プロンプト取得とインスタンス化、プログラム的呼び出し、コマンド実行、結果、診断、副作用、記録、実行前安全確認へ関与することを示します。

label: mcp protocol surface module contains
definition: declares additional input and sibling terms as members of the MCP Protocol Surface module scope.

definitions.en: declares additional input and sibling terms as members of the MCP Protocol Surface module scope.
definitions.zh: 声明补充输入及同组术语属于 MCP 协议表面模块的成员范围。
definitions.ja: 追加入力と同族の用語が MCP プロトコルサーフェスモジュールの範囲に属することを示します。

label: mcp protocol surface module emits event
definition: connects operations in the MCP Protocol Surface module to observable TraceEvent records.

definitions.en: connects operations in the MCP Protocol Surface module to observable TraceEvent records.
definitions.zh: 把 MCP 协议表面模块中的操作连接到可观察 追踪事件 记录。
definitions.ja: MCP プロトコルサーフェスモジュール内の操作を観測可能な 追跡イベント 記録へ接続します。

label: mcp protocol surface module relates
definition: connects additional input to MCP authorization when both participate in model MCP client/server participants, sessions, transports, authorization, elicitation, roots, sampling, and server-exposed resources, prompts, tools, and capability metadata.

definitions.en: connects additional input to MCP authorization when both participate in model MCP client/server participants, sessions, transports, authorization, elicitation, roots, sampling, and server-exposed resources, prompts, tools, and capability metadata.
definitions.zh: 在 MCP 协议表面模块中，把补充输入连接到 MCP 授权，表示它们参与客户端/服务器参与者、会话、传输、授权、补充信息请求、根范围、采样，以及服务器暴露的资源、提示、工具和能力元数据。
definitions.ja: MCP プロトコルサーフェスモジュールにおいて、追加入力を MCP 認可へ接続し、クライアント/サーバー参加者、セッション、トランスポート、認可、追加情報要求、ルート範囲、サンプリング、サーバー公開リソース、プロンプト、ツール、能力メタデータへ関与することを示します。

label: capability registry and definition module contains
definition: declares API operation and sibling terms as members of the Capability Registry And Definition module scope.

definitions.en: declares API operation and sibling terms as members of the Capability Registry And Definition module scope.
definitions.zh: 声明 API 操作及同组术语属于能力注册与定义模块的成员范围。
definitions.ja: API 操作と同族の用語が能力登録と定義モジュールの範囲に属することを示します。

label: capability registry and definition module emits event
definition: connects operations in the Capability Registry And Definition module to observable TraceEvent records.

definitions.en: connects operations in the Capability Registry And Definition module to observable TraceEvent records.
definitions.zh: 把能力注册与定义模块中的操作连接到可观察 追踪事件 记录。
definitions.ja: 能力登録と定義モジュール内の操作を観測可能な 追跡イベント 記録へ接続します。

label: capability registry and definition module relates
definition: connects API operation to capability descriptor when both participate in model tool, resource, prompt, API operation, and capability-surface registries, definitions, schemas, descriptors, versions, and permission declarations.

definitions.en: connects API operation to capability descriptor when both participate in model tool, resource, prompt, API operation, and capability-surface registries, definitions, schemas, descriptors, versions, and permission declarations.
definitions.zh: 在能力注册与定义模块中，把 API 操作与能力描述符连接起来，表示二者共同参与工具、资源、提示、API 操作和能力表面的描述结构。
definitions.ja: 能力登録と定義モジュールにおいて、API 操作と能力記述子を接続し、両者がツール、リソース、プロンプト、API 操作、能力サーフェスの記述構造に関与することを示します。

label: tool registry registers tool definition
definition: declares that a tool registry contains or registers a specific tool definition available for discovery, filtering, and invocation.

definitions.en: declares that a tool registry contains or registers a specific tool definition available for discovery, filtering, and invocation.
definitions.zh: 声明工具注册表包含或登记某个可供发现、过滤和调用的工具定义。
definitions.ja: ツール登録簿が、発見、フィルタリング、呼び出しに利用できる特定のツール定義を含む、または登録していることを示します。

label: tool result conforms to schema
definition: records schema conformance between an observable tool result and the result schema declared by the tool definition.

definitions.en: records schema conformance between an observable tool result and the result schema declared by the tool definition.
definitions.zh: 记录可观察工具结果与工具定义声明的结果 Schema 之间的符合关系。
definitions.ja: 観測可能なツール結果とツール定義が宣言する結果スキーマとのスキーマ適合を記録します。

label: tool result flagged as tool stream injection
definition: links a tool result to the tool-stream injection signal that marks unsafe instructions, deceptive tool guidance, or exfiltration cues in returned output.

definitions.en: links a tool result to the tool-stream injection signal that marks unsafe instructions, deceptive tool guidance, or exfiltration cues in returned output.
definitions.zh: 该关系把工具结果连接到工具流注入信号，标记返回输出中的不安全指令、欺骗性工具引导或外泄线索。
definitions.ja: この関係は、ツール結果を、返却出力中の安全でない指示、欺瞞的ツール誘導、持ち出し手掛かりを示すツールストリーム注入信号に結びます。

label: tool result observation enters context
definition: links a tool result observation to the context package that stages the observation for a later model call or agent step.

definitions.en: links a tool result observation to the context package that stages the observation for a later model call or agent step.
definitions.zh: 把工具结果观察连接到上下文包，表示该观察会被暂存给后续模型调用或 agent 步骤。
definitions.ja: ツール結果観測を文脈パッケージへ接続し、その観測が後続のモデル呼び出しまたはエージェント手順へステージングされることを示します。

label: tool result scanned by pattern scan
definition: links a tool result to the scan that inspected logs, streamed chunks, artifacts, status text, or result messages before reuse in context or action selection.

definitions.en: links a tool result to the scan that inspected logs, streamed chunks, artifacts, status text, or result messages before reuse in context or action selection.
definitions.zh: 该关系把工具结果连接到扫描，该扫描在结果被复用于上下文或动作选择前检查日志、流式分块、产物、状态文本或结果消息。
definitions.ja: この関係は、ツール結果を、コンテキスト再利用またはアクション選択の前にログ、ストリームチャンク、成果物、状態テキスト、結果メッセージを検査したスキャンに結びます。

label: tool search produces candidate set
definition: records that a tool search operation produces a bounded candidate set rather than exposing every available tool or capability to the model.

definitions.en: records that a tool search operation produces a bounded candidate set rather than exposing every available tool or capability to the model.
definitions.zh: 记录工具搜索产生有界候选集，而不是把所有可用工具或能力都暴露给模型。
definitions.ja: ツール検索が、利用可能なすべてのツールや能力をモデルへ露出するのではなく、有界な候補集合を生成することを記録します。

label: tool selection decision rejects candidate
definition: records a tool candidate rejected by selection because of poor fit, missing permission, unsafe arguments, policy failure, or lower rank.

definitions.en: records a tool candidate rejected by selection because of poor fit, missing permission, unsafe arguments, policy failure, or lower rank.
definitions.zh: 记录因适配差、缺少权限、不安全参数、策略失败或排名较低而被选择决策拒绝的工具候选。
definitions.ja: 適合度不足、権限不足、危険な引数、ポリシー失敗、低順位により選択判断が拒否したツール候補を記録します。

label: tool selection decision selects tool
definition: records which tool was selected by a tool selection decision after candidate ranking, disambiguation, policy filtering, or fallback.

definitions.en: records which tool was selected by a tool selection decision after candidate ranking, disambiguation, policy filtering, or fallback.
definitions.zh: 记录在候选排序、消歧、策略过滤或回退后，工具选择决策选中了哪个工具。
definitions.ja: 候補順位付け、曖昧性解消、ポリシーフィルタ、フォールバックの後、ツール選択判断がどのツールを選んだかを記録します。

label: tool side effect materializes side effect
definition: connects a tool-local side effect record to the canonical safety side effect used for audit, approval, rollback, and disclosure policy.

definitions.en: connects a tool-local side effect record to the canonical safety side effect used for audit, approval, rollback, and disclosure policy.
definitions.zh: 把工具侧副作用记录连接到安全域 规范 副作用，用于审计、审批、回滚和披露策略。
definitions.ja: ツール側副作用記録を、監査、承認、ロールバック、開示ポリシーに用いられる安全ドメインの 標準 副作用 へ接続します。

label: tool side effect requires commit gate
definition: links a tool-local side effect record to the commit gate that must approve, deny, sandbox, or roll back persistent external change.

definitions.en: links a tool-local side effect record to the commit gate that must approve, deny, sandbox, or roll back persistent external change.
definitions.zh: 把工具侧副作用记录连接到必须批准、拒绝、沙箱化或回滚持久外部变化的提交门。
definitions.ja: ツール側副作用記録を、永続的な外部変更を承認、拒否、サンドボックス化、ロールバックする必要があるコミットゲートへ接続します。

label: tool warning attached to result
definition: links a non-fatal warning or diagnostic to a tool result so degraded execution or partial response evidence is not lost.

definitions.en: links a non-fatal warning or diagnostic to a tool result so degraded execution or partial response evidence is not lost.
definitions.zh: 把非致命警告或诊断附加到工具结果，避免降级执行或部分响应证据丢失。
definitions.ja: 非致命の警告または診断をツール結果へ付与し、低下実行や部分応答の証拠が失われないようにします。

label: top-k selection selects retrieved chunk
definition: links a top-k selection decision to the retrieved chunk accepted under rank, diversity, freshness, budget, and policy constraints.

definitions.en: links a top-k selection decision to the retrieved chunk accepted under rank, diversity, freshness, budget, and policy constraints.
definitions.zh: Top-K 选择选中已检索分块关系把 Top-K 选择决策连接到在排名、多样性、新鲜度、预算和策略约束下被接受的已检索分块。
definitions.ja: Top-K 選択が検索済みチャンクを選ぶ関係は、順位、多様性、新鮮度、予算、方針制約の下で受け入れられた検索済みチャンクへ Top-K 選択判断を結び付けます。

label: trace contains span
definition: links a trace record to an operation span so runtime work is represented as nested or related units of work.

definitions.en: links a trace record to an operation span so runtime work is represented as nested or related units of work.
definitions.zh: 把追踪记录连接到操作跨度，使运行工作能够表示为嵌套或相关的工作单元。
definitions.ja: トレース記録を操作スパンへ接続し、実行作業を入れ子または関連した作業単位として表します。

label: trace event belongs to span
definition: links an observable runtime event to the span interval in which it occurred, preserving trace-local ordering and containment.

definitions.en: links an observable runtime event to the span interval in which it occurred, preserving trace-local ordering and containment.
definitions.zh: 把可观测运行事件连接到其发生所在的跨度区间，保留追踪内部顺序和包含关系。
definitions.ja: 観測可能な実行イベントを、それが発生したスパン区間へ接続し、トレース内の順序と包含関係を保ちます。

label: trace event caused by
definition: links a trace event to the prior event that triggered, produced, or explains it, without collapsing causal evidence into narrative text.

definitions.en: links a trace event to the prior event that triggered, produced, or explains it, without collapsing causal evidence into narrative text.
definitions.zh: 把追踪事件连接到触发、产生或解释它的先前事件，同时不把因果证据压缩成叙述文本。
definitions.ja: トレースイベントを、それを発火、生成、説明した先行イベントへ接続し、因果証拠を物語文へ潰しません。

label: trace event ordered before
definition: orders two trace events when one occurred before the other within a span, session, run attempt, or replayable trace sequence.

definitions.en: orders two trace events when one occurred before the other within a span, session, run attempt, or replayable trace sequence.
definitions.zh: 当两个追踪事件在跨度、会话、执行尝试或可回放追踪序列中存在先后关系时，用该关系排序。
definitions.ja: 二つのトレースイベントについて、スパン、セッション、実行試行、再生可能なトレース列の中で一方が他方より前に発生したことを順序付けます。

label: trace event recorded as log record
definition: records that a raw runtime TraceEvent was transformed into a structured LogRecord for observability, diagnostics, audit, or export without replacing the original trace evidence.

definitions.en: records that a raw runtime TraceEvent was transformed into a structured LogRecord for observability, diagnostics, audit, or export without replacing the original trace evidence.
definitions.zh: 该关系把原始轨迹事件记录为结构化日志记录，同时保留原始运行证据。
definitions.ja: この関係は、生のトレースイベントを構造化ログ記録として記録し、元の実行証拠を保持します。

label: trace event records error event
definition: records that a runtime TraceEvent contains or observes an ErrorEvent, keeping raw execution evidence separate from interpreted error classification.

definitions.en: records that a runtime TraceEvent contains or observes an ErrorEvent, keeping raw execution evidence separate from interpreted error classification.
definitions.zh: 该关系说明轨迹事件记录或观察到错误事件，区分原始证据与错误解释。
definitions.ja: この関係は、トレースイベントがエラーイベントを記録または観測したことを示し、生証拠とエラー解釈を分けます。

label: trace has context
definition: links a trace record to the propagation and correlation context that carries identifiers, sampling state, and boundary metadata.

definitions.en: links a trace record to the propagation and correlation context that carries identifiers, sampling state, and boundary metadata.
definitions.zh: 把追踪记录连接到携带标识、采样状态和边界元数据的传播与关联上下文。
definitions.ja: トレース記録を、識別子、サンプリング状態、境界メタデータを持つ伝播および相関文脈へ接続します。

label: trace link source span
definition: links a trace link object to the source span that participates in a non-parent causal or contextual relationship.

definitions.en: links a trace link object to the source span that participates in a non-parent causal or contextual relationship.
definitions.zh: 把追踪链接对象连接到参与非父子因果或上下文关系的源跨度。
definitions.ja: トレースリンクオブジェクトを、非親子の因果または文脈関係に参加する元スパンへ接続します。

label: trace link target span
definition: links a trace link object to the target span reached by a non-parent causal or contextual relationship.

definitions.en: links a trace link object to the target span reached by a non-parent causal or contextual relationship.
definitions.zh: 把追踪链接对象连接到非父子因果或上下文关系所指向的目标跨度。
definitions.ja: トレースリンクオブジェクトを、非親子の因果または文脈関係が到達する先スパンへ接続します。

label: trace record exported as trace export
definition: links a TraceRecord to the TraceExport artifact that packages selected trace evidence for transport, inspection, retention, or semantic export.

definitions.en: links a TraceRecord to the TraceExport artifact that packages selected trace evidence for transport, inspection, retention, or semantic export.
definitions.zh: 该关系把轨迹记录连接到用于传输、审查或保留的轨迹导出产物。
definitions.ja: この関係は、トレース記録を、転送、レビュー、保持に使うトレースエクスポート成果物へ結びます。

label: trace span exported by trace export
definition: links a runtime TraceSpan to the TraceExport package that carries selected span data, attributes, redaction state, and provenance for review or debugging.

definitions.en: links a runtime TraceSpan to the TraceExport package that carries selected span data, attributes, redaction state, and provenance for review or debugging.
definitions.zh: 该关系把运行跨度连接到承载其选定数据和来源的轨迹导出包。
definitions.ja: この関係は、実行スパンを、選択されたデータと来歴を運ぶトレースエクスポートパッケージへ結びます。

label: transfers control to
definition: links a handoff event to the target actor, route, or endpoint that receives control of the next workflow step.

definitions.en: links a handoff event to the target actor, route, or endpoint that receives control of the next workflow step.
definitions.zh: 控制转移关系把交接事件连接到接收下一步工作流控制权的目标参与者、路由或端点。
definitions.ja: 制御移転関係は、引き継ぎイベントを、次のワークフロー手順の制御を受け取る参加者、経路、端点へ結びます。

label: triggers revision attempt
definition: links feedback returned into a control loop to the bounded improvement attempt launched from that feedback.

definitions.en: links feedback returned into a control loop to the bounded improvement attempt launched from that feedback.
definitions.zh: 修订触发关系把返回控制循环的反馈连接到由该反馈启动的有边界改进尝试。
definitions.ja: 修正発火関係は、制御ループへ返されたフィードバックを、そのフィードバックから開始された境界付き改善試行へ結びます。

label: truncated by window
definition: links content to the context or output windowing decision that shortened it.

definitions.en: links content to the context or output windowing decision that shortened it.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

label: uses
definition: links an event or action to the resource, tool, model, memory item, or policy it consumes.

definitions.en: links an event or action to the resource, tool, model, memory item, or policy it consumes.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

label: uses agent as tool
definition: links an orchestrator to a bounded invocation where another agent is called as a helper while manager control is retained.

definitions.en: links an orchestrator to a bounded invocation where another agent is called as a helper while manager control is retained.
definitions.zh: 智能体工具调用关系把编排者连接到一种有边界调用，其中另一智能体作为辅助者被调用而管理者仍保留控制。
definitions.ja: エージェント道具使用関係は、オーケストレータを、別のエージェントを補助として呼び出しつつ管理者が制御を保持する境界付き呼び出しへ結びます。

label: uses protocol envelope
definition: links a message to protocol-level wrapping such as task identity, artifact references, sender, receiver, or capability metadata.

definitions.en: links a message to protocol-level wrapping such as task identity, artifact references, sender, receiver, or capability metadata.
definitions.zh: 该关系谓词连接本体中的指定端点，用于表达消息、来源、上下文选择、披露、执行观测或跨域治理中的明确语义。
definitions.ja: この関係述語は、本体内の指定された端点を結び、メッセージ、出典、コンテキスト選択、開示、実行観測、または領域横断統制の明確な意味を表します。

label: uses resource
definition: event relation that connects an action or event to a resource consumed during execution

definitions.en: event relation that connects an action or event to a resource consumed during execution
definitions.zh: 对象关系定义域为事件类，值域为资源类；用于表达这两个智能体系统术语之间可验证、可追溯的语义连接。证据源 2 项。
definitions.ja: オブジェクト関係は、定義域がイベント類、値域がリソース類です。この二つのエージェントシステム用語の検証可能で追跡可能な意味接続を表します。出典 2 件。

label: uses runtime environment
definition: links an execution attempt to the concrete container, sandbox, working directory, model/tool availability, and configuration used at runtime.

definitions.en: links an execution attempt to the concrete container, sandbox, working directory, model/tool availability, and configuration used at runtime.
definitions.zh: 把执行尝试连接到运行时实际使用的容器、沙箱、工作目录、模型或工具可用性以及配置。
definitions.ja: 実行試行を、実行時に使われた具体的なコンテナ、サンドボックス、作業ディレクトリ、モデルやツールの可用性、設定へ接続します。

label: vector index contains embedding
definition: links a vector index to the embedding vector it stores or makes searchable while preserving index-version provenance.

definitions.en: links a vector index to the embedding vector it stores or makes searchable while preserving index-version provenance.
definitions.zh: 向量索引包含嵌入关系把向量索引连接到其存储或使其可搜索的嵌入向量，并保留索引版本来源。
definitions.ja: ベクトル索引が埋め込みを含む関係は、ベクトル索引を保存または検索可能にする埋め込みベクトルへ結び付け、索引版の来歴を保持します。

label: warning event raises warning
definition: connects a WarningEvent to the Warning it raises so non-fatal risk, uncertainty, degraded confidence, or diagnostic evidence remains inspectable.

definitions.en: connects a WarningEvent to the Warning it raises so non-fatal risk, uncertainty, degraded confidence, or diagnostic evidence remains inspectable.
definitions.zh: 该关系把警告事件连接到其提出的非致命警告。
definitions.ja: この関係は、警告イベントを、それが発した非致命的警告へ結びます。

label: yields run outcome
definition: links a run attempt to its terminal outcome record so success, failure, cancellation, produced artifacts, and final state remain auditable.

definitions.en: links a run attempt to its terminal outcome record so success, failure, cancellation, produced artifacts, and final state remain auditable.
definitions.zh: 把执行尝试连接到其终端结果记录，使成功、失败、取消、产生的产物和最终状态保持可审计。
definitions.ja: 実行試行を終端結果記録へ接続し、成功、失敗、取消、生成成果物、最終状態を監査可能に保ちます。
